channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dollar to Naira Exchange Rates for May 7th, 2026: Black Market and CBN Rates
item.description: Today, May 7th, 2026, the Dollar to Naira exchange rate shows a slight difference between the black market (Aboki FX) and the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) official rates. For the Lagos parallel marke...

item.title: SA Health Authorities Review Airport Screening After Imported Hantavirus Cases
item.description: Two imported cases of hantavirus in South Africa have raised concerns about the country's airport health-screening protocols. Health Minister Dr Aaron Motsoaledi briefed Parliament after two internati...

item.title: DG ISPR Outlines Pakistan’s Military Preparedness and Strategic Achievements
item.description: On the one-year anniversary of Marka-i-Haq, ISPR Director General Lt Gen Ahmed Sharif Chaudhry addressed a press conference highlighting Pakistan’s military readiness and indigenous capabilities. He w...

item.title: DG ISPR Outlines Ten Strategic Outcomes of Marka-i-Haq Conflict with India
item.description: In a press conference held on the one-year anniversary of Marka-i-Haq, DG ISPR Lt Gen Ahmed Sharif Chaudhry stated clearly that any idea of war between two nuclear-armed neighbours like Pakistan and I...

item.title: Tolashe denies knowledge of daughter’s alleged salary arrangement amid food aide controversy
item.description: Social Development Minister Sisisi Tolashe faced tough questioning in Parliament over a series of controversies linked to her department, including allegations involving a state-paid household employe...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of Love Luxury: Scripted Social Media and Dubai Lifestyle
item.description: Love Luxury, a high-end reseller with boutiques in Knightsbridge, London, and Dubai, has gained notoriety for its social media content featuring extravagant luxury purchases. Videos showcasing custome...

item.title: Western Cape High Court permits media coverage of Leano Vergotine trial
item.description: The Western Cape High Court has allowed media to photograph Leano Vergotine, who faces multiple charges of child rape and the creation of child pornography. Vergotine, from the small community of Cere...

item.title: Peter Obi Pledges to Fight Corruption and Review Fuel Subsidy if Elected President
item.description: Peter Obi, former Governor of Anambra State and 2023 presidential candidate, don talk say if na him be President for 2027, he no go allow any form of criminality waka for Nigeria. Obi yarn this one fo...

item.title: David Mark says Obi and Kwankwaso defections will strengthen ADC ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: National Chairman of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Senator David Mark, don talk say the recent defection of Peter Obi and Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso no go weaken the party, but instead go push them...

item.title: Anaheim Ducks Even NHL Playoff Series with 3-1 Win Over Vegas Golden Knights
item.description: The Anaheim Ducks evened their second-round NHL playoff series against the Vegas Golden Knights with a 3-1 victory in Las Vegas. Beckett Sennecke, Leo Carlsson, and Jansen Harkins scored for the Ducks...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari's aide shot dead in North 24 Parganas, West Bengal political tensions rise
item.description: In West Bengal’s North 24 Parganas, Suvendu Adhikari’s personal assistant, Chandranath Rath, was tragically killed by motorcycle-borne assailants late in the night in Madhyamgram’s Doltala area. Eyewi...

item.title: PH FAAN Workers Warn Against Airport Concession Over Job Risks
item.description: Workers at Port Harcourt International Airport, Omagwa, under the unions NUATE and ATSSSAN, don yan say dem ready to take action against FAAN if dem no follow proper procedure for the planned concessi...

item.title: Congress criticises Modi government over diplomatic outcomes and military handling of Operation Sindoor one year after launch
item.description: The Congress party has strongly criticised the central government on the first anniversary of Operation Sindoor, a military action launched by India on 7 May 2025 in response to the Pahalgam terror at...

item.title: Lab-grown insulin-producing cells restore blood sugar control in diabetic mice
item.description: Researchers in Sweden have developed an improved method for generating insulin-producing cells from human stem cells, marking a significant advance in the effort to treat type 1 diabetes. The study, c...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens Fall 4-2 to Buffalo in Series Opener
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens, the last remaining Canadian team in the playoffs, opened their second-round series against the Buffalo Sabres with a 4-2 loss. This matchup contrasts sharply with Montreal's pr...

item.title: DG ISPR reports rise in terrorist attacks following Marka-i-Haq
item.description: On the one-year anniversary of Marka-i-Haq, DG ISPR Lt Gen Ahmed Sharif Chaudhry held a press conference alongside senior naval and air staff. He outlined ten strategic consequences of the 2025 milita...

item.title: ARN shareholders overwhelmingly reject CEO pay package during legal dispute with former hosts
item.description: At ARN Media's recent annual meeting, investors delivered a significant rebuke by overwhelmingly voting down the $1.1 million salary package proposed for new CEO Michael Stephenson. The protest vote, ...

item.title: Sudbury's Kingsway site redeveloped for commercial use
item.description: The Kingsway property in Sudbury, previously vacant, is undergoing redevelopment and is set to reopen as a business park. Local authorities and developers are collaborating to transform the site into ...

item.title: ISPR highlights strategic outcomes on first anniversary of Marka-e-Haq conflict
item.description: Director General of Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR), Lieutenant General Ahmed Sharif Chaudhry, addressed a press conference marking the first anniversary of Marka-e-Haq, alongside senior naval ...

item.title: Ouaddou backs in-form Chaine for Bafana after record clean-sheet season
item.description: Orlando Pirates coach Abdeslam Ouaddou has thrown his full support behind goalkeeper Sipho Chaine, saying he deserves a place in the Bafana Bafana squad for the upcoming FIFA World Cup. Chaine has bee...
